title: Mirror column limits
excerpt:

posts.author: TremorThief12 (Rob Meyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone else find the 2 hop limit that monday has put in place for mirroring data between boards an absolute platform killer?

Does anyone have a workaround? We used to be able to wangjangle a solution but this gap has been “fixed”.

My use case:

We use monday’s CRM and use subitems for pricing in our Opportunities board. The subitems have Connect board columns to pricing boards which mirror price data to the subitem.

These prices are rolled up to the item level (2 hops). I now need to pull through hours sold from the subitems to our project portfolio board but am running in this issue which basically means my portfolio board becomes completely useless.

Any help would be appreciated.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TremorThief12 ,

I might be able to help you with this.

Please can you reach out to us at support@fortimus.co?

Our app - Mirror Item Multiple Boards can help.

This app allows you to -

  • Share the same item/subitem to multiple boards with complete sync
  • Share the subitem as an item to multiple boards with full sync
  • Share/mirror new and existing updates of the item/subitem
  • Setup automations to auto create items on specific boards. We also take custom automation requests!

Centralize your designs (7)1920×960 218 KB

We are also in the process of releasing a feature that helps auto-fill connect boards columns.

Would love to discuss how we can help you! Feel free to Book a meeting directly.
